name: Repository
description: Repository schema from Amazon ECR Amazon Elastic Container Registry (ECR) API

repositoryArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the repository.

registryId.description: The AWS account ID associated with the registry.

createdAt.description: The date and time the repository was created.

imageTagMutability.description: The tag mutability setting for the repository.

imageScanningConfiguration.description: The image scanning configuration for the repository.

encryptionConfiguration.description: The encryption configuration for the repository.
